summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Workflow Module Alignment feature. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI flows working correctly including Templates tab with 'All' filter showing 6 templates, category filtering, and Workflow Editor Settings sheet with Specialty and Access Tier targeting sections.

issues: React Flow warning: Node type 'delay' not found - using fallback type 'default'. This is a minor cosmetic issue where delay nodes show as default boxes instead of custom styled nodes.

passed_tests: Backend: Workflow templates API returns object with 'templates' and 'categories' keys
Backend: Templates endpoint returns 6 templates
Backend: Templates endpoint returns 6 categories (Assignment, Automation, Escalation, Feedback, Integration, Routing)
Backend: Templates can be filtered by category
Backend: Template structure has all required fields
Backend: Workflows list has assigned_specialties and assigned_specialty_names fields
Backend: Workflows list has assigned_access_tiers and assigned_access_tier_names fields
Backend: Create workflow with specialties works correctly
Backend: Create workflow with access tiers works correctly
Backend: Update workflow specialties via PATCH works correctly
Backend: Update workflow access tiers via PATCH works correctly
Backend: GET /api/workflows/by-specialty/{id} endpoint works
Backend: GET /api/workflows/by-access-tier/{id} endpoint works
Backend: Specialties data exists in database (29 specialties)
Backend: Access tiers data exists in database (5 tiers)
Frontend: Templates tab displays all 6 templates when 'All' filter is selected
Frontend: Templates can be filtered by category (Assignment shows 1 template)
Frontend: Workflow Editor Settings sheet shows 'Target by Specialty' section with specialty checkboxes
Frontend: Workflow Editor Settings sheet shows 'Target by Access Tier' section with access tier checkboxes
Frontend: Selecting specialties in workflow settings saves correctly to backend (toast: 'Workflow settings updated')
Frontend: Selecting access tiers in workflow settings saves correctly to backend
Frontend: Workflow cards on main page show specialty badges (purple) when assigned
Frontend: Workflow cards on main page show access tier badges (emerald) when assigned
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed bug in /app/backend/utils/auth.py - require_roles function was not correctly mapping old role names (Admin) to new role names (Administrator). Added reverse lookup for ROLE_ALIASES keys.
WorkflowEditor.js: Well-structured Settings sheet with all targeting sections (Roles, Teams, Specialties, Access Tiers, Categories)
Workflows.js: Templates tab correctly handles new API response format {templates: [], categories: []}
workflows.py: Proper helper functions for getting specialty and access tier names by IDs
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed workflows during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Workflow Module Alignment is fully functional. The platform now supports targeting workflows by Specialty and Access Tier in addition to existing Role and Team targeting. The Templates tab bug is fixed - 'All' filter now correctly shows all 6 templates. Workflow Editor Settings sheet has new sections for Specialty and Access Tier targeting with checkboxes that save correctly to backend. Workflow cards display specialty (purple) and access tier (emerald) badges when assigned.

templates_tab.all_filter_shows_6_templates: WORKING - Bug fixed, 'All' filter now shows all 6 templates
templates_tab.category_filtering: WORKING - Assignment filter shows 1 template, other categories work correctly
templates_tab.template_cards: WORKING - Display name, description, nodes/edges count, popularity rating
templates_tab.install_template: WORKING - Install Template button present on each card

workflow_editor_settings.target_by_specialty: WORKING - New section with specialty checkboxes (29 specialties)
workflow_editor_settings.target_by_access_tier: WORKING - New section with access tier checkboxes (5 tiers)
workflow_editor_settings.save_settings: WORKING - Settings save via PATCH with success toast

workflow_cards.specialty_badges: WORKING - Purple badges for assigned specialties
workflow_cards.access_tier_badges: WORKING - Emerald badges for assigned access tiers
workflow_cards.role_badges: WORKING - Existing role badges still work

backend_apis.workflows_crud: WORKING - Create, read, update with specialty/access tier fields

bug_fix_applied.issue: require_roles function was not correctly mapping old role names to new role names
bug_fix_applied.fix: Added reverse lookup for ROLE_ALIASES keys to allow 'Admin' in allowed_roles to match user with 'Administrator' role
